Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First the current model has a parallel block after creating and approving the requisition Oh right parallel means all those activities create PO receive goods receive invoice match pay can happen in any order or even at the same time which is wrong

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Create Purchase Requisition has to come first no exceptions Then Approve Purchase Requisition can only happen after that You cannot approve before creating Then after approval next step is Create Purchase Order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Create PO has to come before Receive Goods because you need a PO to order the goods Similarly Create PO has to come before Receive Invoice Also Match Invoice to PO has to come after Create PO Receive Goods and Receive Invoice all three And Pay Invoice can only happen after Match Invoice to PO

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The user explicitly listed the intended order as Create PR Approve PR Create PO Receive Goods Receive Invoice Match Invoice to PO Pay Invoice Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The parallel block incorrectly allows all post requisition approval activities to execute in any order violating required dependencies

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: In real P2P once the PO is created Receive Goods and Receive Invoice can happen in parallel like the goods arrive at the warehouse while the invoice is emailed from the supplier

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Match Invoice to PO requires the completed PO received goods and received invoice because you need all three to match PO goods receipt and invoice

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We do not need XOR or LOOP here because there is no choice or repetition in the standard flow

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: The structure would be Root is Sequence Create Purchase Requisition Approve Purchase Requisition then a Sequence with Create Purchase Order then a Parallel block of Receive Goods and Receive Invoice then Match Invoice to PO then Pay Invoice then Close Case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This model allows Create Req Approve Req Create PO Receive Goods Receive Invoice Match Pay Close and also Create Req Approve Req Create PO Receive Invoice Receive Goods Match Pay Close and blocks Pay before Match Match before either receive and Receive before Create PO

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: What if the users intended logic is strict sequence Create PO Receive Goods Receive Invoice Match Pay Close Then we would make that a sequence But standard P2P usually allows invoice and goods in either order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The corrected pseudocode is receive parallel equals Parallel with Receive Goods and Receive Invoice post approval sequence equals Sequence with Create Purchase Order receive parallel Match Invoice to PO Pay Invoice and root equals Sequence with Create Purchase Requisition Approve Purchase Requisition post approval sequence Close Case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The top level Sequence enforces requisition creation and approval first then PO and fulfillment and payment steps then case closure This prevents creating a PO before approval or closing before payment

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The narrow parallel block is only applied to Receive Goods and Receive Invoice and requires both to be completed before Match Invoice to PO so matching cannot occur until both are done

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Placing Pay Invoice directly after Match Invoice to PO ensures payment only occurs after the invoice has been validated against the PO and goods receipt
